title: Design System: The mind of Esteban

display.purpose: Page H1s — Writing / Talks / About / CV / individual article titles. Bricolage Grotesque, balanced wrap.

headline.purpose: CV group titles, homepage hero name, larger section blocks. Bricolage Grotesque.

title.purpose: In-row titles — blog post rows, talk rows, CV section headings. Bricolage Grotesque.

body.purpose: General copy in scan-mode surfaces — indexes, navigation, kicker prose. Bricolage Grotesque.

prose.purpose: Article body, /about/ prose, talks pitch line. Vollkorn serif. Capped at 65ch measure.

label.purpose: Dates, kickers, footer, pagination. Geist Mono, +0.04em tracking, lowercase on kickers.

shadows.name: hover-lift
shadows.purpose: Diffuse lift under .post-row__hero on hover/focus-visible. The only resting-state shadow vocabulary in the system.

motion.name: ease-out-quart
motion.purpose: Default easing for state transitions — link color, hover lift, focus ring.

motion.name: ease-out-expo
motion.purpose: Sharper exit for reveal stagger animations on row lists.

motion.name: duration-instant
motion.purpose: Hover color shifts — fast enough to feel immediate.

motion.name: duration-fast
motion.purpose: Default state transitions — link underlines, focus rings, kicker color.

motion.name: duration-base
motion.purpose: Hero hover lift, more deliberate hover states.

components.name: Primary PDF Button
components.description: Bottom-of-CV download CTA. Solid ink fill, mono small text. The strongest single visual the system makes — one per page max.
components.css: .ds-pdf-button { display: inline-flex; align-items: baseline; gap: 0.5ch; padding: 0.7rem 1.1rem; background: oklch(0.2 0.005 65); color: oklch(1 0 0); font-family: 'Geist Mono', ui-monospace, Menlo, monospace; font-size: 0.9375rem; text-decoration: none; border-radius: 0.25rem; transition: background 140ms cubic-bezier(0.165,0.84,0.44,1), transform 140ms cubic-bezier(0.165,0.84,0.44,1); } .ds-pdf-button:hover, .ds-pdf-button:focus-visible { background: oklch(0.45 0.17 60); transform: translateY(-1px); outline: none; }

components.name: Floating PDF Pill
components.description: Quiet repeat of the PDF affordance — top-right floating pill on /cv/. Bordered, surface-tinted, mono.
components.css: .ds-pdf-pill { display: inline-flex; align-items: baseline; gap: 0.4ch; padding: 0.3rem 0.6rem; border: 1px solid oklch(0.88 0.008 65); border-radius: 0.25rem; background: oklch(0.965 0.006 65); font-family: 'Geist Mono', ui-monospace, Menlo, monospace; font-size: 0.8125rem; color: oklch(0.2 0.005 65); text-decoration: none; transition: border-color 140ms cubic-bezier(0.165,0.84,0.44,1), color 140ms cubic-bezier(0.165,0.84,0.44,1); } .ds-pdf-pill:hover, .ds-pdf-pill:focus-visible { border-color: oklch(0.58 0.155 60); color: oklch(0.45 0.17 60); outline: none; }

components.name: Code Pill (signature)
components.description: In-title technical-noun marker. Inline mono pill in a 14% Workshop Sodium tint with accent-ink text. Appears inside titles and prose only — never in nav, footer, or meta.
components.css: .ds-row-title { font-family: 'Bricolage Grotesque Variable', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 700; line-height: 1.15; letter-spacing: -0.02em; color: oklch(0.2 0.005 65); margin: 0; } .ds-code-pill { font-family: 'Geist Mono', ui-monospace, Menlo, monospace; font-size: 0.85em; font-weight: 600; padding: 0.05em 0.35em; background: color-mix(in oklab, oklch(0.58 0.155 60) 14%, transparent); color: oklch(0.45 0.17 60); border-radius: 0.25rem; letter-spacing: 0; }

components.name: Nav Link (sticky header)
components.description: Geist Mono small, ink-muted by default. Bottom-border on hover (ink) or current (accent). Lives inside the sticky header with backdrop blur.
components.html: WritingTalksCVAbout
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; gap: 1.5rem; padding: 0.5rem; } .ds-nav-link { font-family: 'Geist Mono', ui-monospace, Menlo, monospace; font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.01em; color: oklch(0.42 0.012 65); text-decoration: none; padding: 0.25rem 0; border-bottom: 1px solid transparent; transition: color 140ms cubic-bezier(0.165,0.84,0.44,1), border-color 140ms cubic-bezier(0.165,0.84,0.44,1); } .ds-nav-link:hover, .ds-nav-link:focus-visible { color: oklch(0.2 0.005 65); border-color: oklch(0.2 0.005 65); outline: none; } .ds-nav-link.is-current { color: oklch(0.2 0.005 65); border-color: oklch(0.58 0.155 60); }

components.name: Hero Thumbnail (row)
components.description: 3:2 aspect frame for blog and talk row thumbnails. Surface-tinted bg, rounded-md, hover lift (the only resting-state shadow vocabulary).
components.css: .ds-row-link { display: block; padding: 1rem; text-decoration: none; } .ds-hero-thumb { margin: 0; width: 17.5rem; aspect-ratio: 3 / 2; border-radius: 0.5rem; overflow: hidden; background: oklch(0.965 0.006 65); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; transition: transform 240ms cubic-bezier(0.165,0.84,0.44,1), box-shadow 240ms cubic-bezier(0.165,0.84,0.44,1); } .ds-row-link:hover .ds-hero-thumb, .ds-row-link:focus-visible .ds-hero-thumb { transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 8px 24px -12px color-mix(in oklab, oklch(0.2 0.005 65) 24%, transparent); }

components.name: Mono Kicker (signature)
components.description: Small mono lowercase tag above a row title — category, conference name, or year marker. Never uppercase, never tracked-eyebrow scaffolding.
components.css: .ds-kicker { font-family: 'Geist Mono', ui-monospace, Menlo, monospace; font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 500; color: oklch(0.42 0.012 65); margin: 0; letter-spacing: 0.04em; text-transform: lowercase; }

components.name: Sigil (brand mark)
components.description: Wobbly ring + off-centre filled dot. Honey-colored. Re-used as wordmark suffix, footer dot, favicon, post-hero fallback (slug-seeded position/rotation variants).
components.css: .ds-sigil-wrap { display: inline-flex; color: oklch(0.58 0.155 60); line-height: 0; } .ds-sigil { width: 0.78em; height: 0.78em; }

narrative.overview: An archive that respects the reader's time. Newest-first lists, mono meta, no chrome that doesn't earn its keep. The site is one of three things at any moment — something to read (the writing), something to skim (the indexes / CV / talks shelf), or who is behind this (about + footer avatar). Everything else is gone, demoted, or hiding. The voice is plainspoken, opinionated, idiosyncratic (PRODUCT.md, verbatim).
keyCharacteristics: One sans, one serif, one mono — read-modes vs scan-modes telegraphed by family.
OKLCH-only color tokens. Display-P3 wide-gamut on capable browsers; sRGB-clipped fallback otherwise.
Flat surfaces, tonal layering. Shadows are rare; surface tint + 1px rules carry depth.
Sigil as the brand mark. Reused as wordmark suffix, as post-hero fallback (varied), as the favicon. No second mark.
Honey accent on ≤10% of any given screen. Rarity is the point.

rules.name: The Workshop Sodium Rule
rules.body: The accent appears on ≤10% of any given screen. The Sigil counts. Link underlines count. A 100% sodium fill behind a hero is forbidden — drop it back to --accent-soft (10% tint) or use it as text color via --accent-ink, not as a flood.

rules.name: The Warm Neutral Tint Rule
rules.body: All neutrals share hue 65 at chroma ≤ 0.012. No grey-blue, no cool slate, no green-tinted off-white. The whole grayscale ramp is one warm family.

rules.name: The True White Rule
rules.body: The light-mode body bg is oklch(1 0 0) — chroma 0. Tinted near-whites land in --surface, never in --bg. This is the defence against the cream/sand/parchment slop.

rules.name: The 65ch Rule
rules.body: Prose body lines are capped at var(--measure) (65ch) via max-width. Wider rows look cheap. The wide variant (--measure-wide = 78ch) exists for the CV grouped layout and contact-block prose where strict 65ch is too narrow.

rules.name: The Read-vs-Scan Family Rule
rules.body: Vollkorn is reserved for surfaces the reader settles into — articles, /about/, the talks pitch. Indexes, CVs, navigation, and all rows use Bricolage. Mixing serif into scan-mode surfaces is forbidden.

rules.name: The Lowercase Kicker Rule
rules.body: Kickers are lowercase Geist Mono with +0.04em tracking. Never uppercase, never bold, never above a section heading as scaffolding. Lowercase keeps them as content tags and not as the AI-default tracked uppercase eyebrow.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Shadows are only state responses (hover, focus, drag). Anywhere a shadow appears at rest is a defect.

rules.name: The Rule Over Shadow Rule
rules.body: When you want to separate two stacked sections, reach for a 1px border-top: 1px solid var(--rule) first. Shadows always look heavier than rules; the site reads as 'carefully spaced', not 'dimensionally elaborate'.

dos: Do use oklch() for every color token. The whole palette lives in src/styles/global.css as OKLCH custom properties.
Do use Bricolage for scan-mode surfaces and Vollkorn for read-mode.
Do reach for a 1px border-top: 1px solid var(--rule) first to separate stacked sections.
Do wrap technical proper nouns in backticks inside titles. The renderer translates them to code-pill spans.
Do respect the 65ch measure on prose.
Do use the Sigil — not a monogram, not a logo wordmark — as the brand mark.
Do test light AND dark at 1440 / 768 / 375.
Do cap the Workshop Sodium accent at ~10% screen coverage.
donts: Don't ship the cream / sand / parchment editorial-warm template. Body bg is oklch(1 0 0) (pure white) in light mode, period.
Don't ship generic SaaS landing — no gradient heroes, no big-number metric rows, no triplet of icon-heading-text feature cards.
Don't ship Medium-clone blog — no grey text on white, no big centred serif headlines without chrome.
Don't add a second display font. Bricolage Grotesque is the only sans for headings, titles, body in scan-mode, and the hero.
Don't add tracked uppercase eyebrows. Lowercase Geist Mono kickers are the system's answer.
Don't add numbered section markers (01 · About / 02 · Process). Numbers only earn their place when the sequence carries information.
Don't use border-left greater than 1px as a colored stripe.
Don't use background-clip: text with a gradient. No gradient text anywhere.
Don't use glassmorphism decoratively. Backdrop-blur is reserved for the sticky header.
Don't use circular avatars or round profile crops. The site's idiom is square + sigil.
Don't add box-shadow at rest. Shadows are state responses only.
Don't add a hero-metric row (SaaS cliché).
Don't ship a card grid (identical icon-heading-text tiles).
